components.name: Table
components.description: Enhanced DataGrid component with AI-agent friendly capabilities

legacy.name: onBulkDelete
legacy.description: Bulk delete handler called with selected IDs

legacy.name: bulkDeleteBaseUrl
legacy.description: Base URL for built-in bulk delete. DELETE {url}/delete/{ids}/selected for selected rows. DELETE {url}/delete/all for all rows.

components.name: Column
components.description: Column definition with filtering, visibility, and formatting

props.name: width
props.description: Column width in px or CSS

props.name: stackProps
props.type: { limit?: number; stacked?: boolean; shape?: 'circle' | 'square'; size?: number }

components.name: useServerTable
components.description: Hook for server-side pagination with debounce, transform, and callbacks

options.name: hardReload
options.description: Pass a ref — the hook assigns reload() to it so any external button or function can call hardReloadRef.current() to trigger a refetch

components.name: DefaultActionsConfig
components.description: Configuration for View/Edit/Delete actions with permissions and hooks

props.name: viewForm
props.description: View form fields. Supports type: 'image' to render an image preview

props.name: viewFormGrid
props.description: Grid columns for the view form layout (e.g. 2 = two-column grid). Supports colSpan/rowSpan on each field

props.name: permissions
props.type: (item: T) => { view?: boolean; edit?: boolean; delete?: boolean }

props.name: onReload
props.description: Called after edit/delete to trigger server refetch. Pass reload from useServerTable

components.name: ActionField
components.description: Form field definition for Edit/View modals

props.name: viewType
props.description: Display type for viewForm — controls how the value is rendered in the View modal. Overrides type for view-only rendering.

props.name: width
props.description: Width applied to the field value in the View modal (e.g. 120, '100%', '8rem')

props.name: height
props.description: Height applied to the field value in the View modal (e.g. 80, '5rem')

props.name: render
props.description: Custom renderer — receives current value and onChange

props.name: component
props.description: Drop-in React component rendered as-is. Bypasses label, built-in renderer, and validation. e.g. { component: <Input value={name} onChange={(v) => setName(v.target.value)} label='Name' /> }
